title: QR Code Payment After Order Confirmation & Reset Flow

requirements.summary: Show QRIS QR code payment section only after order confirmation
acceptanceCriteria: The QRIS QR code is hidden during the initial order/cart view
The QRIS QR code becomes visible only after the user submits/confirms their order
The transition to the QR code payment step is triggered by the order confirmation action

file_operations.description: Modify the order confirmation flow to hide the QRIS QR code section until after the user confirms their order. Add a state flag (e.g., orderConfirmed) that starts as false and becomes true only when the user clicks the order confirmation button. Conditionally render the QRIS QR code section (displaying frontend/public/assets/generated/qris-payment-code.dim_300x300.png) only when orderConfirmed is true. Ensure the order confirmation button triggers both the orderConfirmed state change and any existing confirmation logic (such as starting the payment timer).

requirements.summary: Reset entire order state to initial/empty state when payment is confirmed
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Confirm Payment Received' clears the cart and all order data
The UI returns to the initial order/menu state after payment confirmation
Any localStorage order data (e.g., payment timer state) is cleared on reset
The user sees a fresh start without needing a full page reload, OR a full page reload is used to guarantee a clean state

file_operations.description: Update the 'Confirm Payment Received' button handler to clear all order-related localStorage data (including payment timer state managed by usePaymentTimer), reset any order confirmation flags to their initial state, and trigger a full page reload using window.location.reload() to guarantee a completely clean state. Remove or adjust any existing setTimeout delay before reload if it conflicts with immediate user feedback expectations.

Ensure the order state (items, contact info, totals) is fully reset when OrderForm triggers the payment confirmation reset. If App.tsx manages cart state via useState or other local state, ensure those states are cleared before or during the page reload initiated by OrderForm. Verify that no residual order data persists across the reload cycle.
